steps.title: Identify the pivotal contrast
steps.content: Green found the 2016 storytelling “very confusing,” yet he “enthusiastically praised” the 2019 version's storytelling. The word “However” marks this direct reversal in his judgment between the two versions.

steps.title: Determine what the contrast implies
steps.content:
The only explanation for Green's opposite reactions to the two versions is that the storytelling improved.

Choice A states this directly. The other three contradict either his positive 2019 review, what actually happened in the passage, or the direction of improvement.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
